programme.title: Stacey Dooley: Growing Up Gypsy
programme.desc: Stacey meets three young English Romany Gypsy women taking on life's biggest moments. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Yaxlont
programme.desc: When a teenage boy has a girl over for the first time, the overly attached monster under his bed has a meltdown. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: This is BBC Three
programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: This is BBC Three
programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: Proper Ladies
programme.desc: Four very different schoolgirls are thrown together in detention. As they plan their escape, the situation spirals out of control.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sci-fi drama. When the Doctor arrives in Victorian London he finds a dinosaur rampant in the Thames and a spate of deadly spontaneous combustions.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: When a documentary team comes to Button House to investigate a historical assassination plot, Alison and the ghosts are shocked to discover that it involved one of their own.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike starts a new job, while Alison receives revelatory news from an unexpected visitor.

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: Miranda's mother tells one of her daughter's old school friends that Miranda has a great new job, so she decides to prove everyone wrong and find a 'proper' career.

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: Sitcom. Miranda treats herself to a holiday - in the hotel across the road. She enjoys her stay and even makes new friends with porter Jason and conference organiser Colin.

programme.title: Quiz Lady
programme.desc: A game show-obsessed young woman and her estranged train wreck of a sister must work together to help cover their mother's gambling debts. Contains very strong language.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet and Donna compete for a job managing the pub. Louise buys a car with her mother's legacy. Contains adult humour.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet starts her job as manager of The Archer and gives the pub a World War Two theme to appeal to the grey pound. Contains adult humour.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet tries desperately to find a way of keeping the pub open. Louise is feeling unwell, and Kelly thinks she recognises the symptoms. Contains adult humour.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Special horror episode of the sitcom. The Archer is about to be demolished. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Louise, Janet and Donna compete for the job of barmaid at the reopened Archer pub. Contains adult humour.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: With Jonny dead, Janet decides to get through the five stages of grief quickly. Gaz finds a way to help her. Contains adult humour.

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: Miranda's mother tells one of her daughter's old school friends that Miranda has a great new job, so she decides to prove everyone wrong and find a 'proper' career.

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: Sitcom. Miranda treats herself to a holiday - in the hotel across the road. She enjoys her stay and even makes new friends with porter Jason and conference organiser Colin.

programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: EastEnders Omnibus
programme.desc: Max attempts to court Cindy, Walford welcomes a surprise visitor, and the Gulatis and the Panesars try to support Ravi.

programme.title: EastEnders Omnibus
programme.desc: The Mitchells try to get through to Phil, Cindy and Max have a close call, and the Slaters surprise Big Mo.

programme.title: EastEnders Omnibus
programme.desc: Phil's search continues, two Walford residents face a race against time, and Nigel receives some visitors.

programme.title: EastEnders Omnibus
programme.desc: Albert Square comes together to celebrate a friend, Phil battles his inner demons, and Max and Cindy's romance causes friction.

programme.title: Leigh-Anne: Race, Pop and Power
programme.desc: Little Mix's Leigh-Anne Pinnock explores racism across the music industry and confronts her own experiences as the only black member of the band. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: The Woman in Black
programme.desc: The vengeful ghost of a scorned woman terrorises the locals of a remote village. Contains scenes which some viewers may find disturbing.

programme.title: Paranormal: Britain's Last Witch
programme.desc: Sian Eleri investigates the story of the last person convicted under the Witchcraft Act. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Paranormal: Britain's Last Witch
programme.desc: Sian is shaken by a tape which appears to have captured Helen Duncan conjuring a spirit. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Paranormal: Britain's Last Witch
programme.desc: In the Netherlands, Sian meets a medium who claims he can bring back physical spirits. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Paranormal: Britain's Last Witch
programme.desc: Sian is stunned by new evidence, and Helen's granddaughters hold a last gathering. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Leigh-Anne: Race, Pop and Power
programme.desc: Little Mix's Leigh-Anne Pinnock explores racism across the music industry and confronts her own experiences as the only black member of the band. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sci-fi drama. When the Doctor arrives in Victorian London he finds a dinosaur rampant in the Thames and a spate of deadly spontaneous combustions.
